prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次分别为约10919→29255→13937→11767→34569名，波动剧烈。2022年因试卷难度变化位次大幅后移至29255名，2023–2024年回 稳至约1.2–1.4万名，2025年因新高考改革首年（物理类）专业组拆分，不限选科组（102）位次大幅后移至34569名，成为近年最低基准；该校在河南省理科（ 物理类）招生计划2021年104人、2022年124人、2023年122人、2024年121人、2025年196人（因新高考专业组拆分计划数增加），2026年计划大幅增至280人，较2025年扩招 约42.9%，显著缓解竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；2026年软科中国大学主榜排名第38位，近年排名稳定在36–39名区间，属于国内 顶尖工科强校；2025年高考周期内声誉偏负面（实习安全事故），2026年周期内转为中性/混合（主要涉及秦皇岛校区命名争议）；抖音热度排名第82位，评价 为"一般"，短视频曝光量处于中等偏下水平，报考关注度未出现异常升温；第五轮学科评估中，控制科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、冶金工程A、软件工程 A-、机械工程A-、材料科学与工程A-，共6个A-及以上学科，工科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业在2024–2026年持续 高热推荐，与东北大学优势学科高度契合，吸引高分考生报考；河南省2026年普通高考总人数约120万，较2025年物理类+历史类合计约90.7万大幅增长约32%，竞 争基数显著扩大；东北大学位于辽宁省沈阳市，在河南省属跨省招生，无本地倾斜；2025年河南省物理类招生196人占该 校当年物理类总计划一定比例，2026年扩至280人，跨省招生规模扩大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次34569名、2026年大幅扩招约42.9%（缓解竞争）、河南省考生总数 大幅增长约32%（加剧竞争）、学校声誉中性、优势学科与热门专业高度契合等因素，供需弹性计算显示位次应后移至约43459名，但考虑到扩招幅度显著大于考生增幅，实际后移 幅度略小于纯弹性计算值，预测最低位次约42959名，区间42459–43459名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 10919, 29255, 13937, 11767, and 34569 respectively, showing significant fluctuations. In 2022, due to changes in exam difficulty, the ranking dropped sharply to 29255. From 2023 to 2024, it stabilized around 12,000–14,000. In 2025, due to the first year of the new college entrance examination reform (physics category) with major group splits, the unrestricted subject group (102) ranking dropped significantly to 34569, becoming the lowest benchmark in recent years. The university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Henan Province was 104 in 2021, 124 in 2022, 122 in 2023, 121 in 2024, and 196 in 2025 (increased due to major group splits under the new exam). In 2026, the plan significantly increased to 280, an expansion of approximately 42.9% compared to 2025, notably alleviating competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In 2026, it ranked 38th in the main ranking of the Shanghai Ranking's Chinese University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 36–39 range in recent years, making it a top-tier engineering powerhouse in China. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation was somewhat negative (due to a safety incident during internships), but in the 2026 cycle, it turned neutral/mixed (mainly involving a naming dispute over the Qinhuangdao campus). Its Douyin popularity ranking is 82nd, with a rating of "average," indicating medium-low short video exposure and no abnormal increase in application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, it achieved A+ in Control Science and Engineering, A in Computer Science and Technology, A in Metallurgical Engineering, A- in Software Engineering, A- in Mechanical Engineering, and A- in Materials Science and Engineering, totaling six disciplines rated A- or above, highlighting its strong engineering capabilities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, aligning well with Northeastern University's advantageous disciplines and attracting high-scoring applicants. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination takers in Henan Province is approximately 1.2 million, a significant increase of about 32% compared to the combined total of approximately 907,000 for physics and history categories in 2025, greatly expanding the competition base. Northeastern University is located in Shenyang, Liaoning Province, and recruits across provinces in Henan, with no local preference. In 2025, the physics category enrollment in Henan was 196, accounting for a certain proportion of the university's total physics category plan that year, and in 2026, it expanded to 280, increasing cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 34569, the significant enrollment expansion of about 42.9% in 2026 (alleviating competition), the substantial increase of about 32% in the total number of Henan examinees (intensifying competition), the neutral university reputation, and the high alignment between advantageous disciplines and popular majors, supply-demand elasticity calculations suggest the ranking should shift to approximately 43459. However, given that the expansion magnitude is notably larger than the increase in examinees, the actual shift is slightly smaller than the pure elasticity calculation, predicting a minimum ranking of about 42959, with a range of 42459–43459.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Computer Science and Technology
- Automation
- Robotics Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information
- Computer Science (Software Engineering, etc.)
- Mechanical Engineering
- Mathematics
- Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Accessible)
- Materials Science and Engineering
- Economics and Management Experimental Class
- Engineering Experimental Class (Metallurgy/Civil Engineering/Mining, etc.)
- Architecture.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 42459–43459, it is recommended to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Science/Automation/AI) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors as safety choices. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (<42459), focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors. If your ranking is near the upper bound (>43459), prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety. Northeastern University has strong engineering capabilities, with A-level disciplines like Control and Computer Science offering broad employment prospects. It is advisable to prioritize majors closely related to the university's advantageous disciplines.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 2250 → 2836 → 2985 → 2855 → 2901, fluctuating narrowly within the range of 2250–2985, stabilizing between 2836–2985 in the past four years, with a 2025 baseline of about 2901; the university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Henan Province was 37 students in both 2021 and 2022, increased to 42 in 2023, 43 in 2024, 42 in 2025, and planned 42 for 2026, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 38th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, but the university is primarily focused on science and engineering, with a small scale of liberal arts programs; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation was somewhat negative (due to a safety incident during an internship), but turned neutral/mixed in the 2026 cycle; its Douyin popularity ranking is 82nd, with an evaluation of 'average', and no abnormal fluctuations in application attention; the university's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in engineering (Control A+, Computer Science A, Metallurgy A, etc.), with no A- or above discipline evaluation records in liberal arts, indicating that liberal arts programs are not its strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The total number of candidates for the 2026 Henan Province general college entrance examination is approximately 1.2 million, a significant increase of about 32% compared to the combined total of about 907,000 for history and physics categories in 2025; based on the recent history category proportion of about 38.8%, it is estimated that there will be about 466,000 history category candidates in 2026, an increase of about 32.4% from 352,000 in 2025, significantly expanding the competition base; Northeastern University is located in Shenyang City, Liaoning Province, and recruits across provinces in Henan; the liberal arts enrollment plan is only 42 students, small in scale and stable in recent years, with no local preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 2901, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan (42 students), the substantial increase of about 32% in the total number of history category candidates in Henan Province (intensified competition), the neutral reputation of the university, and the fact that liberal arts are not its advantageous disciplines, the supply-demand elasticity calculation shows an unchanged ranking (2901), but the significant increase in candidates will push up competition intensity, with the minimum ranking expected to slightly move forward to about 2871, within the range of 2371–3371.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted ranking range of 2371–3371, Northeastern University offers only 3 liberal arts majors with a small total enrollment of 42 students. It is recommended to focus on the Public Administration Category as the main choice, the Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class as a reach, and the Foreign Languages and Literatures Category as a safety option. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<2371), you can aim for the Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (>3371), apply with caution. Northeastern University is strong in engineering, with limited liberal arts options; candidates should consider their own interests and career plans comprehensively.
